name: Idiopathic fall at work caused neck injury, covered in Utah?
description: Yes if work worsened idiopathic fall.[3]

mainEntity.name: Idiopathic fall at work caused neck injury, covered in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if work worsened idiopathic fall.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly, if work conditions like hard floor worsened it.** Recent appeals clarify.[3] Key factors: Prove employment increased hazard; not just risk, actual aggravation. Medical shows floor impact. Case-specific; attorney argues.
